THE PROFITABILITY FRAMEWORK
The Profitability Matrix is your toolkit for reducing your costs and improving your profits
This section requires you to have put in place the basics on your account and in particular
Graduation Testing
> Analysis & Decision Making - How to analyse and make decisions on where to place
your focus depending on your goals for the account. Includes the metrics I look at, taking
control of CPA & ROAS (Ecom and Digital Product relevant), a CPA calculator swipe file,
insights on Delivery Insights and an introduction to Facebook Analytics.
A must-view for all level of marketers, including demos and a FAQ sheet based on questions
received from fellow students.
Level: Intermediate / Advanced
> The Ads Sniper Strategy - The Ads Sniper Strategy focusses on cutting bad performing
ads, based on ad set performance (and applies to ad sets). A simple yet powerful technique
to get your cost per Lead/Reg/Install/Purchase etc down across your account quickly and
effectively. Full example including how to use Filters & Reports to speed up analysis and
decision making.
Level: Intermediate / Advanced
> Sales Funnel Optimisation - How to optimise your sales funnel, including a Live analysis
of funnel metrics, how to spy on your website visitors, interrogating them for insights and
how this impacts your cost per lead/reg/acquisition. Don't underestimate the role your
funnel/website plays on overall performance.
Level: Intermediate / Advanced
> BOSS The Auction with Manual Bidding - A detailed look through of how the auction
actually works, having spent many hours with Facebook's engineers deconstructing it, using
publicly available data and having run many tests, to give you the lowdown on how to make
the auction work for you and what role manual bidding plays.
Level: Advanced
> Automation & Rules - Automation allows you to run your account on semi-auto pilot, as
long as you define and test the rules that work for your account. No rules will 100% work for
me as it will for you, so this lesson introduces you to the tool I prefer to use, the rules I like to
implement, which cover Ads Sniper and Scaling in particular, plus alerts to ensure I remain
on top of multiple campaigns and specifically for me, multiple accounts/clients to be able to
scale multiple accounts together. Level: Advanced
Once you've completed this section ensure you've shared your wins and insights in my
group!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
